abilities.name: stakeout
abilities.shortEffect: This Pokémon's moves have double power against Pokémon that switched in this turn.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's moves have double power against Pokémon that switched in this turn.
abilities.flavorText: Doubles the damage dealt to a target that has just switched into battle.

abilities.name: strong-jaw
abilities.shortEffect: Strengthens biting moves to 1.5× their power.
abilities.effect: Strengthens biting moves to 1.5× their power.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's strong jaw boosts the power of its biting moves.

abilities.name: adaptability
abilities.shortEffect: Increases the same-type attack bonus from 1.5× to 2×.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon inflicts twice as much damage with moves whose types match its own, rather than the usual same-type attack bonus of 1.5×.
abilities.flavorText: Powers up moves of the same type as the Pokémon.
